description_long: This is a single children's shoe made of blue fabric with a soft, velvety texture and a Mary Jane style. The shoe features a Velcro strap across the top for easy fastening, adorned with a pink flower applique. The upper is decorated with embroidered floral patterns in white, pink, and purple, adding a playful and decorative touch. The sole is rubber, primarily blue with a pink stripe and small pink flower motifs along the side. The interior appears to be lined with a soft, plush material for comfort. The shoe shows signs of wear, with some fading and minor scuffing visible on the toe and sides.
description: A blue children's Mary Jane shoe with floral embroidery, a Velcro strap, and a pink-accented rubber sole. The shoe is fabric-lined and shows light wear.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the heel, blue fabric, and the back opening of the shoe.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the Velcro strap, floral embroidery, and pink flower motifs on the sole.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the toe area with embroidered flowers and the rounded shape of the shoe.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the Velcro strap with a pink flower applique and the continuous floral embroidery.
